eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Klamath, OR; at 10:58 AM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 4:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Klamath County Sheriff: WILDFIRE Evacuation has been lifted for NORTH OF Loveless Rd, Ivory Pines Rd, NFD Road 4464 SOUTH OF NFD Road 4466, Cameron Dr EAST OF NFD Road 4464 WEST OF NFD Road 4466 Residents may remain or return with caution. Watch for emergency vehicles, smoke, damaged infrastructure, and closed areas. Continue to monitor official updates.
